what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for a design-source image asset named vt-property/p-1, declaring its address, blob reference, MIME type, authorship, creation time, and labeling it as design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter ledger record for an image asset
image dimensions w and h are both 0
MIME is image/jpeg and a blob hash is provided
body text states 'SOURCE design ground-truth — vt-property/p-1.jpg'
standouts: Width and height are zero despite being an image record
No links to other ledger entries
concerns: w and h are 0, suggesting unpopulated or unvalidated dimensions
links is empty, leaving the asset isolated in the ledger
Only metadata is present; image content is not inspectable here
notes: A metadata stub for a design-source JPEG asset flagged as ground truth, with zero dimensions and no outgoing links.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What visual content does vt-property/p-1.jpg contain?
Why does this asset have no links to related design or code entries?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record a SOURCE design ground-truth image, which matches the content; however, the record lacks populated dimensions and links, so it is only a partial metadata stub.
intention_signals: To catalog and preserve a source image used as an authoritative design reference for vt-property, making its identity, blob location, origin, and role discoverable.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable metadata record that links a named design-source image to a content blob, author session, and creation timestamp, supporting provenance and retrieval in a fused asset ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for the design-source JPEG image vt-property/p-1, flagged as design ground truth, with blob reference, MIME type, and zero width/height.
intention_for_embedding: To record and make discoverable a source image asset serving as authoritative design reference for vt-property.
